ai_assistance: AI assisted with runner implementation and card drafting; deterministic git commit and SHA-256 checks produced the report.
allowed_claim_sentence: Grok prompt repo passed source audit
baseline_control_summary: Source audit controls required canonical xai-org/grok-prompts remote, non-empty commit hash, README.md present, LICENSE present and at least one prompt file hash in the manifest.
claim_boundary: This source-audit record verifies public repository availability, commit identity, license/readme presence and prompt-file hashes only. It does not prove that any live Grok runtime uses these exact prompts.
known_limitations: No live Grok runtime equivalence is claimed.
No model quality, safety or benchmark-performance claim is made.
No hidden server-side prompt or policy layer is ruled out.
manual_review: Source boundary, no-prompt-text policy and claim boundary reviewed in this repository update.
raw_payload_manifest: external source commit a7c186f5ccac95875c0041aed60398f6ecb6d6c7; prompt file SHA-256 manifest in sanitized report
runner_command: git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/xai-org/grok-prompts <tmp>; uv run python scripts/claimbound_run_grok_prompts_source_audit.py --repo-dir <tmp>/grok-prompts --report artifacts/grok_prompts_source_audit_d001_summary.json
source_rights_note: Public GitHub repository. Repository license file is present; prompt text is not copied into this repository.

visual_summary.allowed_claim_sentence: Grok prompt repo passed source audit
